contextNotes: Design precedence is locked as V4 > V3 > V1 > UI architecture > SSOT/AGENTS.
Use only token-driven styling with Open Sans and strict 4px/8px radii.
No gradients, no glassmorphism, no purple/indigo accents, and no default library aesthetics.
All modules remain manually editable with advisory sequence guidance only.

userStories.title: Foundation Token Conformance Sweep
userStories.description: Normalize shared token/global style usage so every screen inherits the V4 design baseline with no conflicting legacy visual rules.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical V4 tokens exist with exact expected values.
Global layout and typography defaults align with V4 style rules.
No banned visual patterns are introduced.

userStories.title: App Shell and Header Premium Sweep
userStories.description: Refine the global app shell/header, context badge, language control, and launcher interactions so top-level navigation feels enterprise-premium and consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Header remains fixed at 56px with clean hierarchy.
Launcher interaction supports fast keyboard flow and clear focus treatment.
Shell controls follow V4 spacing and border rules.

userStories.title: Routing and IA Integrity Sweep
userStories.description: Ensure route surface and navigation flow match the intended IA with stable redirects and no regressions for legacy entry points.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary IA routes resolve cleanly without dead ends.
Legacy paths continue via intentional redirects.
Global context propagation remains stable.

userStories.title: Company Selector Search-First Sweep
userStories.description: Polish company selector search, suggestions, and list/table hierarchy for premium speed and readability.
acceptanceCriteria: Search suggestions react quickly and are keyboard navigable.
Table/list hierarchy is clear with premium density.
Continue action remains deterministic.

userStories.title: Group Control Panel Premium Sweep
userStories.description: Elevate group control panel layout, profile/summary/directory rhythm, and status signaling consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile, summary, and directory sections are visually separated and coherent.
Status badges use consistent tone logic.
Quick-open actions remain stable.

userStories.title: Workbench Module Hub Sweep
userStories.description: Polish workbench card hierarchy, module ordering cues, and advisory guidance while preserving manual access to all modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Module cards communicate sequence, status, and action clearly.
Out-of-order guidance is visible but non-blocking.
Card styling remains premium and token-aligned.

userStories.title: Core Module Shell Structure Sweep
userStories.description: Harden shared module shell tabs, side navigation consistency, and panel composition across modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Top tabs and left navigation remain coherent across modules.
Sidebar supports dense navigation without visual breakage.
Shell layout remains stable under content pressure.

userStories.title: Tax Adjustments Workbench Sweep
userStories.description: Polish tax adjustments side navigation and pinned final calculation visibility to preserve high-confidence workflow orientation.
acceptanceCriteria: Left sidebar is scrollable, structured, and readable.
Final calculation panel remains visible and legible.
Approved submodule ordering/grouping remains intact.

userStories.title: Account Mapping Grid Precision Sweep
userStories.description: Refine mapping grid states, virtualization fidelity, and override/exception interactions to feel like a premium financial workbench.
acceptanceCriteria: Grid remains smooth under large row counts.
AI/manual/exception/selection states are clearly differentiated.
Override and inline command interactions remain deterministic.

userStories.title: Tax Return INK2 Replica Sweep
userStories.description: Improve the INK2 screen’s replica feel (A4 framing, grid lines, numeric alignment, AI field highlights) without breaking form data wiring.
acceptanceCriteria: INK2 canvas remains constrained and premium.
Grid line treatment remains crisp and deterministic.
Numeric fields remain tabular-aligned.

userStories.title: Loading, Empty, and Error States Sweep
userStories.description: Harden skeleton-first loading and premium empty/error state consistency across primary frontend pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Core surfaces use skeletons rather than spinner-first loading.
Empty and error states are consistent and actionable.
No disruptive visual jumps between states.

userStories.title: Final Consistency and Cutover Sweep
userStories.description: Run a final consistency pass over frontend component styling and docs to ensure premium coherence and no regressions remain before sign-off.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend premium style remains coherent across all major routes.
No known UI regressions remain in selector->workbench->module flows.
Docs and memory reflect final frontend loop decisions.
